summary: Indexing state is WORSE than expected. Jul 4 sitemap fix is not recovering on schedule. Phase 39 content is live and well-built but Google hasn't re-crawled yet.

live_state.phase39_quality: 10/10 calc pages have H3=13, FAQ JSON-LD ok, ~6,300-7,950 words

diagnosis.constraint: Indexing API DISABLED for QFINHUB per V2 skill (May 28). Cannot submit via API. Sitemap ping deprecated. Only path is natural Google crawl.
diagnosis.lag_explanation: Jul 4 sitemap fix restored 223 URLs. Google crawl lag on 100-page site = 7-14 days. We're at day 7 -- recovery likely in days 8-14 (Jul 12-18).
diagnosis.phase39_timing: Phase 39.1/39.2/39.3 deployed Jul 4-11. Google won't re-crawl until Jul 11-25. Too early to see indexing lift in GSC yet.

immediate_actions_taken: Confirmed OAuth Indexing API token expired 794h ago -- DISABLED per V2, no fix needed
Verified all 18 Phase 39 URLs are in sitemap and live (200 OK)
Verified Phase 39.1 calculator-blog-links populates 125/125 (H3=13 benchmark met)
Verified Phase 39.2 calc pages have FAQ JSON-LD + correct word counts
Verified Phase 39.3 hubs have 4-5 calc internal links (boundary, could improve)

next_concrete_actions.action: ADD 5 more internal calc links to each of 8 Phase 39.3 hubs (currently 4-5, target 8-10)
next_concrete_actions.impact: HIGH -- improves internal link equity flow from hubs to humanized calcs (Phase 39.2)

next_concrete_actions.action: ADD lastmod + priority hints to Phase 39.3 hub URLs in sitemap (some are getting low crawl signals)
WAIT 7-14 days for natural crawl recovery, monitor with daily-tracker
next_concrete_actions.impact: TIME-DEPENDENT -- Google's crawl lag is the actual bottleneck

next_concrete_actions.action: BACKLINKS: Begin Parasite SEO on Reddit/Medium/Quora (Pinterest/Reddit crons paused per user)
next_concrete_actions.impact: HIGH -- only external ranking signal we control
next_concrete_actions.effort: MEDIUM -- needs user to unpause cron a189625a4ab2 (Reddit)

blocked_actions: OAuth Indexing API submission: DISABLED per V2 skill (May 28, 2026). Google risks domain flagging if used for non-JobPosting/BroadcastEvent content.
CloakBrowser GSC UI indexing: Available but unnecessary -- natural crawl is the V2 strategy.

action_executed.action: Expanded relatedCalculators on 8 Phase 39.3 hubs from 4 to 8 each (32 new internal links added)
action_executed.also_fixed: Broken emergency-fund link in fed-enforcement-actions (was 404, now links to valid em-fund slug)

model_routing_fix.issue_1: delegation.model=deepseek-v4-pro + provider=deepseek with empty api_key. DEEPSEEK_API_KEY unset in shell env. Subagents fell back to DEEPINFRA_API_KEY (invalid).
model_routing_fix.issue_2: Model name 'MiniMax-M3' is invalid — supported names are 'MiniMax-M2.7' and 'MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed' per hermes-agent docs.
model_routing_fix.fix: Changed ~/.hermes/config.yaml: model.default + models.default/pro/content + delegation.model all = 'MiniMax-M2.7'. provider=minimax.

deploys_jul11.action: Add 'Federal Reserve & Your Money' homepage section (8 hub links)
Add lifetime-value + inventory-turnover to homepage (2 missing Phase 39.2 calcs)
